meaning: adj.制成表的,扁平的,表格式的,平坦的vi.列表,排成表格式
examples: The results are presented in tabular form.
Grid elements are configured in tabular format.
There are also MIB objects that return tabular data.
Some spend the summer months surviving on large tabular icebergs off the coast.
Seeing hundreds of columns graphically (see graph) is much more effective than looking at five columns in a tabular view.
